title: Dialer Interface inside monday.com
excerpt: Does monday.com provide a dialer interface inside the platform i.e I do not have to go to the third party tool I can make the calls directly from monday. Most of the dialers in the marketplace are not supported in Africa…

posts.author: Dynam (lus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does monday.com provide a dialer interface inside the platform i.e I do not have to go to the third party tool I can make the calls directly from monday. Most of the dialers in the marketplace are not supported in African countries.

I use 3cx as a tool to pass the calls. Can it be integrated that the dialer interface to call and hangup calls is on the monday.com app. Query phone number and populate the item card if the number is found. If anyone can help with this lets talk. Also to set predictive dialing?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lus,

We have our phone column which will open your default call application in your device:

That said, if you’re interested in using a query to populate an item card, etc, I’d recommend posting this in our developers community

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml: Just for anyone finding this in 2025 - There is now an integration app which can be used with monday.com work management or CRM to get your 3CX instance sharing data with monday.com as you’d hope. See Capable 3CX Integration - monday.com Marketplace
